comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Observed during gate while working on tau-vaiq. `npm run test` intermittently/consistently in full suite fails at test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts: 'keeps newly saved memory out of the active-session system prompt until session_start' with received systemPrompt='base' instead of containing the saved memory hook. Running the same test file in isolation passes (`npx vitest run test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts`). This appears to be ordering/concurrency sensitive and unrelated to worker background fiber changes.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Follow-up: subsequent `npm run gate` completed successfully (full suite green). Keeping this open as an intermittent/flaky failure candidate because full-suite runs failed twice earlier on the same assertion while isolated test runs passed.
